payload.approved_business_description: B2B SaaS for logistics and supply-chain analytics
payload.previous_text: Helvetia Analytics helps logistics and supply-chain teams improve forecasting, routing, and operational planning through subscription analytics software.
payload.new_text: Helvetia Analytics now supports institutional clients with digital-asset liquidity, crypto OTC execution, and stablecoin settlement workflows. Its new treasury desk helps corporate clients convert between CHF, EUR, USDC, and BTC for cross-border settlement and liquidity management.
payload.website_text: Helvetia Analytics now supports institutional clients with digital-asset liquidity, crypto OTC execution, and stablecoin settlement workflows. Its new treasury desk helps corporate clients convert between CHF, EUR, USDC, and BTC for cross-border settlement and liquidity management.

risk_implications: materially different counterparties and transaction flows
original low-risk SaaS KYC baseline may no longer be valid
